articles.author: Michael Kan
articles.title: The FCC Just Banned the Sale of New Wi-Fi Router Models Made Outside US - PCMag
articles.description: The surprising order means any new Wi-Fi router models sold in the country must be US-made, or receive an exemption from the Pentagon or Homeland Security Department.
